description: Triangles meeting seven at each vertex — dual of {7,3}

fundamentalTriangle.note: Same triangle as {7,3} with p and q vertex labels swapped

legLengths.noteSwap: Compared to {7,3}: OP and OQ are swapped

geometry.vertexAngles: 2π/7 (at each vertex, seven triangles meet, angle = 2π/7 each)

dualRelation.dualDescription: The {3,7} and {7,3} tilings are combinatorial duals: vertices of {3,7} are face-centers of {7,3}
dualRelation.dualConstruction: Place a vertex at each heptagon center of {7,3}, connect adjacent centers to get {3,7}

colorScheme: Seven-arm radial color gradient, dark background with warm vertices
